property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testAdminAccessGranted
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-29T13:37:58.441+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.qiwenshare.file.UserRoleTest]: UserRoleTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-29T13:37:58.454+08:00 INFO 6500 --- [qiwen-file] [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.qiwenshare.file.FileApplication for test class com.qiwenshare.file.UserRoleTest Creating a new SqlSession Registering transaction synchronization for SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2b16efeb] JDBC Connection [HikariProxyConnection@1134633052 wrapping conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:qiwen_file_test user=SA] will be managed by Spring ==> Preparing: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM qiwen_user ==> Parameters: <== Columns: TOTAL <== Row: 0 <== Total: 1 Releasing transactional SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2b16efeb] Transaction synchronization deregistering SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2b16efeb] Transaction synchronization closing SqlSession [org.apache.ibatis.session.defaults.DefaultSqlSession@2b16efeb]
